text:
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
EXPLANATION: The paper exists and is well-documented across multiple authoritative sources (arXiv:1409.1556, DBLP, Oxford VGG page, Semantic Scholar). The cited authors K. Simonyan and A. Zisserman exactly match the real authors Karen Simonyan and Andrew Zisserman. The automated checker's "author count mismatch" reporting only "Simonyan" appears to be a database artifact, not a genuine author discrepancy.
LINK: https://arxiv.org/abs/1409.1556
